name: Styrotech Industries
summary: 64 IP cameras in a MIDC industrial zone, all viewable from the Mumbai office — a remote-monitoring showcase.
challenge: An industrial plant in the Ranjangaon MIDC zone needed surveillance that head office in Mumbai could watch live, while keeping wiring and maintenance costs down.
solution: Konect installed 64 IP cameras designed to be viewed remotely, with the full feed accessible from the Mumbai office and the layout planned to save wiring and maintenance.
result: Management in Mumbai monitors the entire Ranjangaon plant in real time — a working showcase of Konect's remote-monitoring capability.
